summary: Completed testing for iteration 19: Stripe Subscription Step 5 feature verification. All backend API tests (6/6) and frontend UI tests passed. The subscription flow is working correctly - business registration creates Stripe Checkout session and returns valid Stripe URL.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - Server healthy, DB connected, Stripe in 'test' mode
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register - Successfully registers business and returns token
Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/subscription/status - Returns 'none' status for new business
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/subscribe - Creates Stripe Checkout session with valid URL and session_id
Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/subscription/status?session_id=XXX - Works with session verification
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/subscribe returns 401 without auth (authentication required)
Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/subscription/status returns 401 without auth (authentication required)
Frontend: /business/register - Displays 5 steps (1-5) with new 'Suscripción' step visible
Frontend: Step 1 'Datos del negocio' - Form fields work correctly
Frontend: Skip subscription button - data-testid='skip-subscription-button' present
Frontend: Success page shows '¡Suscripción activada!' title
Frontend: Success page shows pricing '$39 MXN al mes'
Frontend: Success page shows trial info 'Tu primer mes es GRATIS'
Frontend: Success page has 'Ir a mi panel' button with data-testid='go-to-dashboard'

mocked_api_note.Stripe: Using sk_test_emergent (test mode) with Emergent proxy - Real Stripe Checkout URLs generated

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified the Stripe subscription Step 5 feature. Key findings: (1) POST /api/businesses/me/subscribe correctly creates Stripe Checkout session and returns valid checkout URL starting with 'stripe.com' or 'checkout.stripe.com', (2) GET /api/businesses/me/subscription/status returns correct status ('none' for new business, can verify session_id), (3) Frontend 5-step registration works with new 'Suscripción' step visible in progress bar, (4) /business/subscription/success page shows success message with $39 MXN pricing and 30-day trial info. Stripe is configured with sk_test_emergent key using Emergent proxy at https://integrations.emergentagent.com/stripe. Key data-testids: step-subscription, subscribe-button, skip-subscription-button, subscription-success-page, go-to-dashboard. App URL: https://stripe-webhook-debug-2.preview.emergentagent.com
